verdict.note: JSON --result stored kind=data & served application/json; text --result stored kind=transcript & served text/plain — kind derived from content, not the flag

dashboard renders the data entry as a labelled, pretty-printed, validatable data block (.eval-datawrap/.eval-datahead/.eval-data), distinct from .eval-transcript; a sibling transcript reading still renders as raw <pre>

真浏览器读 DOM:valid JSON → .eval-datawrap>.eval-datahead 'structured data (JSON)'+pretty-print pre.eval-data;invalid-JSON blob → 'invalid JSON' 标记+原始字节,不默读为散文;同 tab 兄弟 transcript/img/video 原样;CLI 往返 kind data/transcript 且 blob 路由 Content-Type 对应
JSON --result → kind:data,自由文本 → kind:transcript(kind 从字节导出非 flag);blob 路由分别服务 application/json 与 text/plain,存储 kind 与服务 Content-Type 一致;--image/--video 不变
